name: Chocolate Orange Ribbon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch pans.
3. Melt the Snickers with milk until smooth, then cool to room temperature.
4. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions.
5. Divide the batter in half. Stir the candy mixture into half of the batter.
6. Stir the grated orange peel into the remaining batter.
7. Spoon the chocolate (Snickers) batter and yellow batter alternately into the cake pans, creating a marbled effect.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes in the pans before removing them to cool on racks.
9. Frost with Fluffy Orange Frosting.
10. Drizzle Chocolate Glaze in a circle around the edge of the cake, allowing it to run down the sides.
Serves 10-12.
Chocolate Glaze:
1. Melt the Snickers and milk together until easily drizzled.
